ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the simulation */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation type */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation was started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation ended */,
  "estimated_time" REAL /* Estimated time for the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES simulation_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES simulation_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated simulation */,
  "n" REAL /* Parameter 'n' for the simulation */,
  "p" REAL /* Parameter 'p' for the simulation */,
  "n_steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps in the simulation */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to run the simulation */,
  "bottom_reached" INTEGER /* Indicator if the bottom was reached */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the parameters */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter set was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the parameter set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter set was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES simulation_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameters associated with the result */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated from the simulation */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., final, intermediate) */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the result */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES simulation_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation related to the log */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the simulation type (e.g., physical, machine learning) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the simulation type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the resource entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated simulation */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the simulation run */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the simulation run */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage during the simulation run */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with the resource usage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the resource entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resource usage was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_resources_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_sets" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter set */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with the parameter set */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameters for the simulation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version of the parameter set */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter set */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter set was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_sets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_sets_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_times" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution time record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related simulation */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time for the simulation run */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with the execution time */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the execution time entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the execution time was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_times_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_times_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Time when the error occurred */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with the error */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the error log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_errors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_errors_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation related to the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_notifications_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
